---
title: "Longitudinal Data Analysis: Mixed Models, GEE, and Missing Data"
subtitle: "Track A — Biostatistics"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Longitudinal Data Analysis: Mixed Models, GEE, and Missing Data

**Track**: Track A — Biostatistics

Repeated measures and correlated data arise in virtually every clinical study. This textbook covers the two major frameworks — subject-specific (mixed models) and population-averaged (GEE) — along with the critical problem of missing data.

## Table of Contents

1. Longitudinal Study Design and Data Structures
2. Linear Mixed Models: Theory
3. Covariance Structure Modeling
4. Generalized Linear Mixed Models (GLMMs)
5. Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE)
6. Missing Data Mechanisms and Impact
7. Multiple Imputation
8. Joint Models for Longitudinal and Time-to-Event Data

---

## Chapter 1: Longitudinal Study Design and Data Structures

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Linear Mixed Models: Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Covariance Structure Modeling

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Generalized Linear Mixed Models (GLMMs)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Missing Data Mechanisms and Impact

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Multiple Imputation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Joint Models for Longitudinal and Time-to-Event Data

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
